title: Industrial Automation
shortDesc: Complete automation system design and integration for manufacturing lines, process plants, and industrial operations from concept to commissioning.

title: PLC & SCADA Solutions
shortDesc: Custom PLC programming, SCADA system design, and HMI development across all major platforms for complete process visibility and control.

title: Building Automation
shortDesc: Integrated BMS, HVAC control, lighting management, and energy monitoring systems for commercial buildings and industrial facilities.

title: Agriculture Automation
shortDesc: Precision irrigation control, pump automation, greenhouse climate management, and SCADA-based crop monitoring for modern farming operations.

title: Security Solutions
shortDesc: Integrated surveillance, access control, intrusion detection, and perimeter protection systems for industrial and commercial sites.

title: Automation Consultancy
shortDesc: Technology selection, system architecture, feasibility assessment, and roadmap planning to guide your automation investment with technical clarity.
